description: GoHighLevel CRM for AI agents. 60+ tools for contacts, messaging, calendars, and payments.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.northrosetech/ghl-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: GoHighLevel Private Integration Token. Create at: GHL Settings → Private Integrations → Create New Integration.
environmentVariables.name: GHL_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: GoHighLevel sub-account (location) ID. Visible in the URL when viewing a sub-account.
environmentVariables.name: GHL_LOCATION_ID

environmentVariables.description: GHL API base URL. The default works for all standard installs.
environmentVariables.name: GHL_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Value for the GHL API Version header.
environmentVariables.name: GHL_API_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: 'stdio' for Claude Desktop / Claude Code, 'http' for N8N and remote clients.
environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
